title: Unified Legacy Settings
description: This mod adds native setting options to Legacy4J's menus for various mods.
body:
Native Legacy4J Mod Settings
--- Unified Legacy Settings adds supported mod options directly into the Legacy4J settings menus. Setting names and descriptions are styled to match the original LCE interface and options. --- ## ### | Setting | Mod Required | |---|---| | Advanced Graphical Effects | [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) | | Extended Render Distance | [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) | ### | Setting | Mod Required | |---|---| | Grass Detail | [LambdaBetterGrass](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdabettergrass) | | Snow Layer Blending | [LambdaBetterGrass](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdabettergrass) | | Connected Textures | [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) | | Emissive Textures | [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) | | Third-Person Animations | [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) | ### | Setting | Mod Required | |---|---| | Dynamic Lighting | [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) | | Zoom | [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) | | Locator Compass | [Locator Lodestones](https://modrinth.com/mod/locator-lodestones) | | Minimap | [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) | ### | Setting | Mod Required | |---|---| | Presence Footsteps | [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) | ### | Setting | Mod Required | |---|---| | Chat Portraits | [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) | | Take Screenshot on Achievement | [Advancement Screenshot](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-screenshot) | *More mods to be supported in the future...* --- ## You can tweak things through **Mod Menu → Unified Legacy Settings → Config** or the Unified Legacy Settings entry in Legacy4J's Advanced User Interface screen. --- ## Everything listed under Supported Mods is optional. The following are required: - [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) Mod Menu is optional and only needed for the Mod Menu config shortcut. ---
Not affiliated with the [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) developers · MIT License
